title: [InstCombine] Set !prof metadata on Selects identified by add.ll test

tests.test_body:
define i5 @and_add(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i5 @and_add(
; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 [[Y:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X]], true
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = and i1 [[Y]], [[TMP1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP2]], i5 -2, i5 0, !prof [[PROF2]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i5 [[R]]
  %xz = zext i1 %x to i5
  %ys = sext i1 %y to i5
  %sub = add i5 %xz, %ys
  %r = and i5 %sub, -2
  ret i5 %r
}
tests.source_program:
define i5 @and_add(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
  %xz = zext i1 %x to i5
  %ys = sext i1 %y to i5
  %sub = add i5 %xz, %ys
  %r = and i5 %sub, -2
  ret i5 %r
}
